name: frontend
description: "Use when implementing frontend pages/components, state management, client-side data loading, forms, interaction logic, and accessibility in Next.js/React. Keywords: frontend, react, nextjs, component, form, state, client, hydration."
---

# Frontend Skill

## Goal
Deliver robust, readable, and user-friendly frontend behavior with clear state and resilient UX.

## Use When
- Creating or refactoring React/Next.js components.
- Building forms, tables, and interactive flows.
- Handling loading, empty, success, and error states.
- Resolving hydration or client-side behavior issues.

## Workflow
1. Define user interaction path and states.
2. Implement clear state transitions and guards.
3. Keep component responsibilities focused.
4. Wire backend calls with safe error handling.
5. Ensure responsive behavior and keyboard accessibility.
6. Validate with lint/build and manual route checks.

## Quality Checklist
- No hidden side effects in render.
- Forms validate and fail gracefully.
- UI communicates loading/error clearly.
- Role/permission behavior is visible to users.
- Components remain easy to maintain.

## Output Format
- User-facing behavior changes.
- Technical implementation notes.
- Accessibility and responsiveness checks.
- Validation commands and outcome.
